Module 5:
Brilliant Recalls PLC 3
!
Executive Summary
PLC #3 of Susan Garrett’s Brilliant Recalls course
First, go back and watch the first two videos to see how she does high
value teaching that naturally leads to the sale.
She begins PLC #2 by doing a review of the first two videos and the
promise in them.
• 	1:12 - The hook for the video and the coming sale
• 	1:40 - 3:20 - Welcome to “do land” - paints a picture of this much better
place and the strategic layers to get there
• 	3:20 - Delivers another story and teaching
• 	Naturally ties into the main idea and Story Arc of the PLC’s - this is
key!
• 	4:24 - Lots more training that reinforces the overall message and Story
Arc
• 	6:36 - Hooks people strongly here - 5 keys for “inspired training”
• 	6:45 - Teaching: know what you want
!

-- 1 of 2 --

• 	7:30 - Teaching: visualize the outcome
• 	8:26 - Authority: “lecturing around the world” - saying something like that
instantly gives her authority on the topic
• 	9:00 - 18:40 - Teaching that provides huge value and naturally builds
toward the offer
• 	18:40 - Begins to pivot toward the offer (a lot of people miss this!)
Overall, Susan does a very good job of naturally leading into the sale. She
doesn’t use any “slimey” or “hypey” sales techniques, just valuable
teaching.
This proves that it’s not necessary to be a natural salesperson, nor is it
necessary to be push. The “take it or leave it” approach works well,
especially if you know your stuff well.
!
